svg.text: Upgraded query producer — ReAct agent with tools

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the freshness classifier determine if a topic is recent or evergreen?')
g.text: LLM decides: recent event or evergreen topic?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the seed search work for breaking news topics?')
sendPrompt('How does context extraction work from seed search results?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM generate informed queries using seed context?')
sendPrompt('How does the evergreen query generation path differ from the recent events path?')
sendPrompt('How does the date-aware query tagging work?')

svg.text: Tools available to the ReAct agent
web_search(query) — live Google/SerpAPI search for current results
web_fetch(url) — fetch and extract content from a URL
get_current_date() — returns today's date for date-aware queries
